ollama_local_small.notes: Good first local sweep when running Ollama on a laptop/desktop. Replace model tags with `ollama list` output.

ollama_local_stronger.notes: Use only if your machine has enough RAM/VRAM. These tags are examples; confirm availability with your Ollama install.

llamacpp_gguf.notes: llama-server usually serves one GGUF at a time unless you put a router/load balancer in front. The model name may be ignored by the server.

hosted_openai_compatible_oss.notes: For Together, Fireworks, Groq, vLLM, SGLang, TGI, LM Studio, or another OpenAI-compatible router. Set VIBECHECKBENCH_LLAMACPP_API_KEY if needed.
